label: Jin-soo Park, Head of Legal at Hanseo Logistics
why_this_persona: Korean HQ marketplace platform operating across KR/JP/DE. Tests the rule set for assumed-Western jurisdictional bias and non-English-jurisdiction regulatory baseline. Korean Personal Information Protection Act, JP APPI, EU operations.

regulatory_seed.label: Act on the Protection of Personal Information (Japan)
Korea Fair Trade Commission marketplace rules

regulatory_answer_key.label: APPI (Act on the Protection of Personal Information, Japan)
GDPR (DE operations + customer data from EU)
KFTC marketplace fairness rules (Korea Fair Trade Commission)
KR P2P Online Financial Transactions Act (if carrier payouts launch)
IMO SOLAS (safety of life at sea)
US OFAC sanctions (cross-border carriers via embargoed routes)
Vietnam PDPD + Indonesia PDP Law (customer-jurisdiction privacy)
PSD2 / BaFin ZAG (DE payment-services licence — open-notes workstream)

stakeholders_seed.escalation_threshold_label: CFO approval for KRW 1B+ commitments; CEO for regulatory escalations to KFTC level

open_notes_seed: We're applying for an EU PSD2-style payment-services licence in Germany this quarter to enable carrier payouts in-network — separate workstream from logistics regulatory.
conversation_style: precise, occasional clarifying back-questions, brief turns

first_turn_questions.regulatory: KFTC is asking us how we calculate our carrier-ranking algorithm — they're testing whether marketplace operators apply discriminatory weights. We do weight by historical on-time delivery, claim ratio, and pricing. Where is the line between performance-based ranking and prohibited discrimination under the Fair Trade Act marketplace rules, and what's our defensible documentation posture?
first_turn_questions.privacy: A Japanese shipper customer is asking for an APPI data-transfer agreement separate from our standard DPA — they want explicit consent flows for their corporate users' information. Our Korean PIPA flow gets consent at signup; can we cover both with one document or do we need parallel addenda?
